extension.summary: A Streamlined Utility Tool for Kodi
extension.description: No Bloatware, no Nonsense! Just Keep your Kodi sharp and clean with this utility tool... Now with a Custom Wizard. The "++" fork backs up and restores over Kodi's VFS, so Backup Location / Restore can point straight at a network share (nfs://, smb://) or any VFS path, not just local storage.
extension.news: v2026.07.13.1: New "Set up this box" menu: adds the mini KodiShare/KodiBackup sources, installs and points Multi Weather at Sacramento, and turns on the RSS ticker (the surviving Foundation setup, moved here from the retired tony7bones setup add-ons). v2026.07.13.0: Menu: cleaner thin Title-Case labels. Dropped the bold ALL-CAPS and forced white color so items render in the active skin's native thin font and adapt color on focus. v2026.07.09.1: Boot: size alerts moved off the boot path behind GUI-ready; fixed cache clean skipping dir-only levels; fixed packages count; removed dead wizard/builds machinery v2026.07.09.0: Fix: the post-restore setup steps were numbered backwards. The device-name question is asked first, so it is now labelled 1 of 2, and the video-quality question 2 of 2. 2026.07.08.6 - Fix (Apple TV only): after a restore, Kodi's File Manager no longer lists every settings file twice in the profile folder. On Apple TV a restore has to copy your settings into Apple's private store so they survive a reopen, and it was also leaving
